## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link the issue it closes. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `perf` — performance
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `build` / `ci` / `chore`

## Scope

- **Service / package / app:**
- **Bounded context(s) touched:**

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run, environments, manual steps. -->

```bash
pnpm run lint
pnpm run type-check
pnpm test
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `pnpm run lint`, `type-check`, and `test` pass locally
- [ ] `pnpm run architecture:check` passes (if services/contracts changed)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or DB dumps added; `.env.example` updated if config changed
- [ ] Docs / `CHANGELOG.md` updated where relevant
- [ ] Cross-context contract changes have the owning team's approval (CODEOWNERS)
